purpose: Define the closure audit requirements for end-to-end deployment legitimacy verification across the governed deployment topology. The audit classifies deployment lineage as closed, open, or failed. It does not deploy, create authority, generate proof, or execute.

upstream_input.core_invariant: Closed merge lineage must be the source of the deployed object.

required_checks.proof_binding_hash_bound_to_validated_ob: proof_binding_hash == canonicalHash(merge_legitimacy_closure_hash + merge_commit_sha + deployable_artifact_hash + validated_object_hash + deployment_hash + deployment_proof_id)

deploy_source_binding.core_invariant: Closed merge lineage must be the source of the deployed object.

validation.build_provenance_hash_canonical: build_provenance_hash == canonicalHash(source_commit_sha + artifact_hash + build_workflow + build_run_id + builder_identity + built_at)

build_provenance.core_rule: Build system creates artifact. Deploy audit verifies the artifact's provenance.

missing_vs_divergent_boundary.DEPLOY_RECONCILIATION_INCOMPLETE: Required provenance or lineage evidence is missing or cannot be replayed — field is absent or null
missing_vs_divergent_boundary.DEPLOY_LINEAGE_DIVERGENCE: Required evidence exists but fields disagree — both fields present, values do not match

outputs.DEPLOY_LEGITIMACY_CLOSURE_REPORT: Complete audit record of the deployment legitimacy chain
outputs.deployment_gap_inventory: Inventory of any missing or incomplete chain links
outputs.lineage_integrity_report: Report of lineage continuity across all chain steps
outputs.deployment_readiness_classification: Final readiness classification from the required classifications set

classifications.DEPLOY_LEGITIMACY_CLOSED: All audit chain links are intact and verified — deployment lineage is complete, consistent, replay-safe, authority-bound, and proof-bound
classifications.DEPLOY_LEGITIMACY_OPEN: Deployment lineage exists but merge legitimacy upstream is not yet closed
classifications.DEPLOY_LINEAGE_DIVERGENCE: Required evidence exists but fields disagree — commit, artifact hash, or validated object hash mismatch
classifications.DEPLOY_PROOF_MISMATCH: Proof binding hash mismatch or build provenance hash does not match canonical derivation
classifications.DEPLOY_REPLAY_DIVERGENCE: Invocation nonce replayed or deployment proof reused
classifications.DEPLOY_AUTHORITY_INVALID: Session, continuity, or authority validation failed
classifications.DEPLOY_RECONCILIATION_INCOMPLETE: Required provenance or lineage evidence is missing or cannot be replayed

canonical_compression.rule_2: Authority continuity. Hash continuity. Replay safety. Proof lineage.
canonical_compression.rule_7: DEPLOY_LEGITIMACY_CLOSURE_REPORT is recorded finality audit, not deployment authorization.
